# ID Constants for the AECreateAppleEvent Function

Specify values for the ID parameters of the `AECreateAppleEvent` function.

## Overview

You use these constants with the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/1448525-aecreateappleevent] function. 

## Constants

- **kAutoGenerateReturnID**: If you pass this value for the `returnID` parameter of the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/1448525-aecreateappleevent] function, the Apple Event Manager assigns to the created Apple event a return ID that is unique to the current session.
- **kAnyTransactionID**

items.description: If you pass this value for the `returnID` parameter of the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/1448525-aecreateappleevent] function, the Apple Event Manager assigns to the created Apple event a return ID that is unique to the current session.
